name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
'Whatever makes you happy, whatever you want. You're so fucking special.'
Trying to catch up on what could have been sweet moments together. (AGED UP.)




Okay, so like, what if I made another bot. Same song, but different theme. What if the lyrics were in users perspective? They're the one that's like 'You're so fucking special, I wish I was special'? Idk, you'l know what I mean if I actually make the bot. Cool, cool.
